arts.ttl: Successful surgery for Edoardo Bove: Subcutaneous defibrillator Implanted
arts.sum: Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove has successfully undergone surgery to implant a subcutaneous defibrillator following a cardiac arrest he experienced during a match against Inter Milan on December 1. The post Successful surgery for Edoardo Bove: Subcutaneous defibrillator Implanted appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Allegri Not Rushing Return amid West Ham and Roma Buzz
arts.sum: Massimiliano Allegri has resurfaced in the last couple of weeks and has been spotted on the stands of a few matches and in England. The former Juventus coach is preparing for his return, but it’s not necessarily imminent. The post Allegri Not Rushing Return amid West Ham and Roma Buzz appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
